nodes.label: Unit 5: Courage & Inspiration
nodes.description: Don't Be Afraid of the Dark, Helen Keller, and Adjectives

nodes.label: Don't Be Afraid of the Dark
nodes.description: A poem about being brave and not fearing the darkness

nodes.label: Poem's Message
nodes.description: Darkness is natural and there is nothing to fear about it

nodes.label: Nature at Night
nodes.description: The poem shows that animals, stars, and the moon make the night beautiful

nodes.label: Being Brave
nodes.description: The poem encourages children to face fears and be courageous

nodes.label: Helen Keller
nodes.description: The inspiring true story of a deaf-blind girl who changed the world

nodes.label: Early Life
nodes.description: Helen lost her sight and hearing at 19 months due to illness

nodes.label: Anne Sullivan
nodes.description: Her devoted teacher who spelled words into Helen's palm to communicate

nodes.label: The Water Moment
nodes.description: Helen's breakthrough: she understood 'W-A-T-E-R' when water flowed on her hand

nodes.label: Achievements
nodes.description: Graduated college, wrote 12 books, gave speeches worldwide, inspired millions

nodes.label: Adjectives
nodes.description: Describing words that tell us more about a noun

nodes.label: Types of Adjectives
nodes.description: Adjectives describe colour (red), size (big), shape (round), quality (brave), number (three)

nodes.label: Position in a Sentence
nodes.description: Adjectives usually come before the noun: 'a brave girl', 'the dark night'

nodes.label: Adjectives from the Unit
nodes.description: brave, dark, blind, deaf, determined, inspiring, beautiful, kind, tall, little
